name: curriculum study loop: an empty digest with no topics produces no ledger records and exits cleanly
command:
printf '%s' '{"topics":[]}' > digest.json
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/curriculum-study.sh" --digest digest.json --ledger l.jsonl --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>&1 | grep -E 'topics_total=0' 1>&2
[ ! -e l.jsonl ] && echo empty-clean 1>&2
